# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: web-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: auth-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: web-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - web.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - api.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: auth-authn
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - auth.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-to-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: auth-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: api-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-web-to-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: web-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-auth-to-api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: auth-authn
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-api-to-web
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: web-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - group: policy.linkerd.io
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      name: api-authn
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: web
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: auth
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: web
      containers:
        - name: web
          image: nginx:1.25
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: hashicorp/http-echo:1.0
          args:
            - "-text=api"
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 5678
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: auth
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: auth
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: auth
      containers:
        - name: auth
          image: hashicorp/http-echo:1.0
          args:
            - "-text=auth"
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 5678
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: web
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: http
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: api
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: http
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: auth
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: http
